author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
William Byron and Mamba Smith had a lot to say about this one 🏎️💨
Motorfest doesn't hold back.
#TheCrewMotorfest Season 10 drops July 1.

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
We're hiding the car. On purpose. 😏
Earn it: complete the Hawaii Grand Tour, 1h+ across the Hawaiian archipelago.

#TheCrewMotorfest Season 10, available July 1st 🗓️

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
Did you know NASCAR cars have fake headlights? 💡
William Byron breaks it down, then takes Motorfest straight to Huntington Beach 🌴
#TheCrewMotorfest Season 10 drops July 1.
